steps.title: Convert time and set up the system
steps.content:
Convert 15 hours to minutes: $15 \times 60 = 900$ minutes.

Let $f$ = minutes with fence and $n$ = minutes without fence. From the problem:
$$f + n = 900$$
$$1.03f + 0.56n = 701.40$$

steps.title: Solve using substitution
steps.content:
From the time equation: $n = 900 - f$.

Substitute into the revenue equation:
$$1.03f + 0.56(900 - f) = 701.40$$
$$1.03f + 504 - 0.56f = 701.40$$
$$0.47f = 197.40$$
$$f = \frac{197.40}{0.47} = 420$$
Jackson spends 420 minutes mowing lawns with a fence.
